_comment: Forest of Distorted Divine Sense — a unique region in Zhao Country where divine sense is scrambled. Canon: Wang Lin fled here while being chased by Core Formation cultivators. The forest's natural properties (ancient restriction formations embedded in the terrain) distort spiritual perception. Cultivators below Soul Formation lose their sense of direction and cannot detect threats. Even Nascent Soul cultivators find their range reduced. Mortals feel a vague unease. Prime Directive: the distortion is an objective property of the ancient restrictions embedded in the land. It is not created by the observer.
